fields.label: GTIN
fields.tooltip_md: Trade identifier such as UPC or EAN.

fields.label: Actuation Force
fields.tooltip_md: Force required to actuate the switch.

fields.label: Switch Lifespan
fields.tooltip_md: Rated lifetime in millions of keystrokes.

fields.label: Hot-Swappable
fields.tooltip_md: Whether switches can be swapped without soldering.

fields.label: Switch Pin Support
fields.tooltip_md: Which MX-style switch pin formats the PCB accepts.

fields.label: Switch Compatibility
fields.tooltip_md: Which switch families or magnetic formats the board supports.

fields.label: Function Row
fields.tooltip_md: Whether a dedicated F-row is present.

fields.label: Arrow Keys
fields.tooltip_md: Whether dedicated arrow keys are present.

fields.label: Multi-Device Pairing
fields.tooltip_md: How many wireless devices can be stored.

fields.label: Multi-Device Pairing Count
fields.tooltip_md: How many devices can be stored for quick switching.

fields.label: Detachable Cable
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the wired cable can be removed from the keyboard.

fields.label: Scan Rate
fields.tooltip_md: Internal keyboard scan rate when disclosed separately from polling rate.

fields.label: Analog Input
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the keyboard can output analog or controller-style input.

fields.label: Backlighting
fields.tooltip_md: Backlight class supported by the keyboard.

fields.label: Per-Key RGB
fields.tooltip_md: Whether each key can be lit independently.

fields.label: Media Controls
fields.tooltip_md: Type of dedicated media playback and volume controls.

fields.label: Onboard Profile Count
fields.tooltip_md: How many profiles can be stored locally.

fields.label: QMK / VIA Support
fields.tooltip_md: Open firmware and live remapping support.

fields.label: OS Mode Switch
fields.tooltip_md: Dedicated switch or shortcut for Windows/macOS mode.

fields.label: Gasket Mount
fields.tooltip_md: Whether a gasket isolation mount is used.

fields.label: Stabilizer Mount
fields.tooltip_md: How the stabilizers mount to the plate or PCB.

fields.label: South-Facing LEDs
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the PCB uses south-facing LEDs.

fields.label: Front Height
fields.tooltip_md: Keyboard height at the front edge.

fields.label: Rear Height
fields.tooltip_md: Keyboard height at the rear edge.

fields.label: Weight
fields.tooltip_md: Keyboard weight including the main chassis.

fields.label: Adjustable Feet
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in foot positions for height adjustment.

fields.label: Sound Dampening
fields.tooltip_md: Level of factory sound dampening treatment.

fields.label: Battery Capacity
fields.tooltip_md: Nominal battery capacity for wireless keyboards.

fields.label: Battery Life (Lighting Off)
fields.tooltip_md: Battery life estimate with lighting disabled.

fields.label: Battery Life (Lighting On)
fields.tooltip_md: Battery life estimate with lighting enabled.

fields.label: Charging Method
fields.tooltip_md: How the keyboard recharges or receives replaceable power.

fields.label: Price Range
fields.tooltip_md: Typical launch or current street-price band.

fields.label: Discontinued
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the product is no longer sold by the manufacturer.

fields.label: Color
fields.tooltip_md: Factory color options or primary colorway.

fields.label: Software Required
fields.tooltip_md: Whether software is required for headline features.

fields.label: Compatible OS
fields.tooltip_md: Operating systems or platforms officially supported.

fields.label: Colors
fields.tooltip_md: EG-compatible colorway tokens. Lowercase + hyphens only. Multi-color variants use "+" (e.g. black+red). Must match canonical EG palette. Normalize grey→gray.

fields.label: Editions
fields.tooltip_md: EG-compatible edition slugs. Kebab-case only (lowercase, hyphens, no spaces). Examples: cyberpunk-2077-edition, sf6-chun-li, wilderness.
